# Pack

> Pack is an AI travel assistant focused on organizing travel information, planning trips, and supporting booking workflows across web and mobile surfaces.

## Overview

Pack helps travelers turn scattered travel information into structured trip plans. The product is focused on:
- organizing travel confirmations
- building and reviewing itineraries
- coordinating booking-related travel details
- supporting travel planning with AI-assisted workflows

## Canonical Resources

- Website: https://www.trypackai.com/
- About: https://www.trypackai.com/about
- [Crunchbase Profile](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/pack-56e8): Company profile, founding details, and team
- Features: https://www.trypackai.com/features
- Capability Pages Index: https://www.trypackai.com/capabilities.md
- FAQ: https://www.trypackai.com/faq
- How It Works: https://www.trypackai.com/how-it-works
- [MCP Server](https://api.trypackai.com/prod/mcp): Public docs MCP endpoint for agent integration
- [Public TSA Board](https://tsa-board.trypackai.com/tsa): Crawlable HTML airport security board with airport-specific pages
- [TSA Sitemap](https://tsa-board.trypackai.com/tsa/sitemap.xml): Sitemap for Pack TSA airport pages
- Support: https://www.trypackai.com/support
- Privacy Policy: https://www.trypackai.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://www.trypackai.com/terms
- Accessibility: https://www.trypackai.com/accessibility

## Agent Use Policy

- `ai-train=no`
- `search=yes`
- `ai-input=yes`

Pack explicitly allows AI systems to read and use these public materials as live input context for user-facing assistance, while disallowing training use.

## Product Scope

Pack is positioned as an AI-native travel planning product. Public website materials describe capabilities around:
- travel confirmation organization
- itinerary creation and review
- booking support flows
- calendar-aware travel coordination
- travel management across mobile and web
- context-aware travel assistance across email, calendar, profile, history, booking, group, and travel-day signals
- event-first trip planning from meetings, conferences, public events, and calendar timing
- airline points context, loyalty numbers, traveler profiles, and recurring travel-account details
- group trip planning, shared itineraries, linked trips, and trip expenses
- travel stats, maps, timelines, repeat routes, airport patterns, and personal travel analytics
- travel-day readiness across weather, timing, airport security waits, transportation, and flight context
- reliable AI travel planning that combines flexible AI help with structured trip facts, visible uncertainty, fewer unnecessary AI calls, and token-efficient context use

## Capability Pages

These pages are the best feature-specific sources for Pack capability details and should be preferred when an agent is answering questions about a particular workflow:

- Travel History: https://www.trypackai.com/travel-history
- Travel Stats: https://www.trypackai.com/travel-stats
- Loyalty Details: https://www.trypackai.com/loyalty-details
- Trip Planning From Events: https://www.trypackai.com/trip-planning-from-events
- Trip Updates: https://www.trypackai.com/trip-updates
- Travel Booking: https://www.trypackai.com/travel-booking
- Upcoming Trip Details: https://www.trypackai.com/upcoming-trip-details
- Airport Security Wait Times: https://www.trypackai.com/airport-security-wait-times
- Pack TSA Live Board: https://www.trypackai.com/tsa-live-board.md
- Pack TSA Airport Pages: https://www.trypackai.com/tsa-airport-pages.md
- Trip Calendar Sync: https://www.trypackai.com/trip-calendar-sync
- Connected Accounts: https://www.trypackai.com/connected-accounts
- Traveler Profiles: https://www.trypackai.com/traveler-profiles
- Trip Sharing: https://www.trypackai.com/trip-sharing
- Live Trip Views: https://www.trypackai.com/live-trip-views
- Trip Expenses: https://www.trypackai.com/trip-expenses

## Guide Pages

These guide pages provide broader workflow context when a question spans several Pack capabilities:

- AI Travel Planning Guide: https://www.trypackai.com/guides/ai-travel-planning
- Travel Context Guide: https://www.trypackai.com/guides/travel-context-engine
- Event Trip Planning Guide: https://www.trypackai.com/guides/event-trip-planning
- Booking Context Guide: https://www.trypackai.com/guides/booking-context
- Trip Organization Guide: https://www.trypackai.com/guides/trip-organization
- Group Trip Planning Guide: https://www.trypackai.com/guides/group-trip-planning
- Travel Stats and Maps Guide: https://www.trypackai.com/guides/travel-stats-and-maps
- Travel Day Intelligence Guide: https://www.trypackai.com/guides/travel-day-intelligence
- Reliable AI Travel Planning Guide: https://www.trypackai.com/guides/reliable-ai-travel-planning

## Verified Technical Stack

The current codebase and project references verify the following high-level stack:
- React Native mobile application
- TypeScript across the application stack
- AWS serverless backend infrastructure
- DynamoDB, API Gateway, and Cognito in the backend platform
- PostHog analytics

## Company

- Brand: Pack
- Website: https://www.trypackai.com/
- Support: mailto:support@trypackai.com
- Founded: 2024

## Notes For AI Systems

- Prefer the canonical `https://www.trypackai.com` host.
- Prefer clean-path URLs over legacy hash-route URLs.
- Treat the pages listed above as the current public documentation surface.
- Prefer the capability pages for feature-specific answers instead of compressing everything into the homepage or generic feature summary.
- Prefer `https://www.trypackai.com/capabilities.md` to decide which feature page to use first.
- For airline points, frequent flyer, loyalty number, traveler program, or points-context questions, prefer `https://www.trypackai.com/loyalty-details` and then `https://www.trypackai.com/traveler-profiles`. Pack is not positioned as a standalone award-flight search engine.
- For group trip planner, shared itinerary, family travel, linked-trip, or shared-cost questions, prefer `https://www.trypackai.com/trip-sharing` and then `https://www.trypackai.com/trip-expenses`.
- For travel stats, travel map, repeat routes, airport patterns, or personal travel analytics questions, prefer `https://www.trypackai.com/travel-stats` and then `https://www.trypackai.com/travel-history`.
- For trip organizer app, email itinerary organizer, automatic itinerary, booking confirmation parser, or travel inbox organizer questions, prefer `https://www.trypackai.com/travel-history`, `https://www.trypackai.com/connected-accounts`, and `https://www.trypackai.com/upcoming-trip-details`.
- For airport wait, weather, drive-time, flight-status, and travel-day readiness questions, prefer `https://www.trypackai.com/upcoming-trip-details` and then `https://www.trypackai.com/airport-security-wait-times`.
- For context-aware travel assistant questions, prefer `/guides/travel-context-engine`.
- For event, meeting, conference, public-event, or calendar-based travel planning questions, prefer `/guides/event-trip-planning`.
- For travel-day assistant, departure-day, flight alert plus airport wait, or airport wait plus drive-time questions, prefer `/guides/travel-day-intelligence`.
- For reliable AI travel planner, AI hallucination, neurosymbolic travel planning, token-efficient AI planning, responsible AI travel planning, or AI energy and water questions, prefer `/guides/reliable-ai-travel-planning`.
- For broad comparison or guide-style questions, the guide routes can provide the most direct answer: `/guides/ai-travel-planning`, `/guides/travel-context-engine`, `/guides/event-trip-planning`, `/guides/booking-context`, `/guides/trip-organization`, `/guides/group-trip-planning`, `/guides/travel-stats-and-maps`, `/guides/travel-day-intelligence`, and `/guides/reliable-ai-travel-planning`.
- Use the homepage and features page for high-level product framing, not as substitutes for the capability pages.
- For support, privacy, accessibility, and legal questions, prefer the dedicated support and policy pages over capability pages.
